General.Name: Chaoju Eye Care Holdings Ltd
General.Description: Chaoju Eye Care Holdings Limited owns and operates a network of ophthalmic hospitals and optical centers in China. Its consumer ophthalmic services include treatments and prevention for various ophthalmic disorders, such as refractive and presbyopia correction, myopia prevention and control, dry eye syndrome, and oculoplastic, as well as optical products and services. The company also provides treatment for eye diseases, including cataract, glaucoma, squint, ocular fundus diseases, ocular surface diseases, orbital diseases, and pediatric eye diseases. In addition, it offers Amblyopia recovery services; and sells eyewear, equipment, and optical products. Chaoju Eye Care Holdings Limited was founded in 1988 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.
